name: Hermes Toolgate
description: The headless agent's terminal as a GOVERNED confined action: one command line, run only inside the exod sandbox, behind an un-liftable destructive floor. The floor is a pure predicate in blessed chip code; it self-tests against a pinned case table before every run and fails closed. LOOK OUT FOR each tool's structured JSON; LOGS TO CHECK: floor_report.json + exec.out + the executor run-ledger.

prepared.description: inputs validated — CMD present, record_store writable

floored.description: the floor proved itself (pinned case table classified clean) AND allowed this CMD; WORKDIR resolves inside the cargo workspace

executed.description: CMD ran confined via the governed channel; stdout+stderr captured to the cargo workspace

g_floored.description: the floor is proven, the command is allowed, the cwd is inside the workspace

g_confined.description: ran ONLY inside the exod sandbox, ONLY through executor.py

a_floor.description: classify the pinned case table with the pure predicate (executes nothing); then floor_verdict(CMD) must allow

a_execute.description: run CMD confined, cwd bound to the cargo workspace, output captured to $OUT

safety_invariants.name: floor_before_exec
safety_invariants.description: GUARDRAIL: CMD executes ONLY after floor_verdict allows it — the floor lives in blessed (hash-verified) chip code; the agent supplies var VALUES only, so no agent-side permission mode can lift it.

safety_invariants.name: floor_proves_itself_first
safety_invariants.description: GUARDRAIL: a floor that misclassifies ANY pinned case refuses the run — fail closed, before the agent's CMD is even looked at.

safety_invariants.name: pure_predicate_floor
safety_invariants.description: STRUCTURAL: the floor predicate (hermes_floor.sh) contains NO execution path — a floor test can never run a command. Enforced by construction + review, recorded here after the 2026-07-22 incident (a floor gap was tested by running the executor unsandboxed).

safety_invariants.name: workspace_bound
safety_invariants.description: GUARDRAIL: WORKDIR resolves inside the cargo workspace — cwd escapes are refused.

safety_invariants.name: confinement_primary
safety_invariants.description: GUARDRAIL: the snippet runs ONLY inside the exod sandbox (no network, dropped privileges, only the cargo workspace bound rw). The floor is defense-in-depth; confinement is the guarantee.
